prompt: I keep running into the same issue with the frontend not connecting to the API when I restart the dev servers. It happens intermittently. Should I create a GitHub issue to track this, and how should I document it for future debugging?

assertions.name: github-issue-template
assertions.description: Provides a valid GitHub issue template with title, reproduction steps, expected/actual behavior

assertions.name: includes-error-log-guidance
assertions.description: Mentions including error logs and stack traces in the issue

assertions.name: troubleshooting-wiki-suggestion
assertions.description: Suggests creating a TROUBLESHOOTING.md or similar documentation for recurring issues

assertions.name: environment-details
assertions.description: Issue template includes space for environment details (Python version, Node version, OS)

assertions.name: reusable-format
assertions.description: Format is structured and can be reused for other frontend/API issues
